title: Straight From The Ore
body:
# The Point of this Mod
This Mod adds new Ores. Each Ore type has their own Fragment, Compacted Block and Sword.


# What it can do


This mod helps the player by making easy powered ores using a Ore Powerer and getting pretty good swords/tools




### List of Items:
- Orepowerer
- Hammer
- Ikeorite Fragment
- Mystorite Fragment
- Sandanite Fragment
- Block of Ikeorite
- Block of Mystorite
- Block of Sandanite
- Ikeorite Sword
- Mystorite Sword
- Sandanite Sword
- Mystorite Ore
- Ikeorite Ore
- Sandanite Ore

# Requirements

- Modloader: Forge
- Version:   1.12.2

# Installing Guide:

- Download the Mod from Modrinth or from Curseforge
- Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your `mods` folder. The mods folder can be found here: C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods
- Now start the Game.



(MOD NOT FINAL EXPECT UPDATES VERY FREQUENTLY)
